main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int main (int argc, char *argv[])

Function Documentation

int main (int argc, char * argv[])

Definition at line 7 of file strings/main.c.

7                                  {
8   int count = 1;
9   static struct option long_options[] = {
10     {"count", required_argument, 0, 'n'},
11     {"help", no_argument, 0, 'h'},
12     {0, 0, 0, 0}
13   };
14 
15   int opt;
16   while ((opt = getopt_long(argc, argv, "n:h", long_options, NULL)) != -1) {
17     switch (opt) {
18       case 'n':
19         count = atoi(optarg);
20         break;
21       case 'h':
22         printf("Usage: ascii-chat-strings [-n|--count COUNT]\n");
23         printf("Generate memorable session strings (adjective-noun-noun format)\n");
24         printf("\nOptions:\n");
25         printf("  -n, --count COUNT   Generate COUNT session strings (default: 1)\n");
26         printf("  -h, --help          Show this help message\n");
27         return 0;
28       default:
29         return 1;
30     }
31   }
32 
33   if (count <= 0 || (long long)count > ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS) {
34     return 1;
35   }
36 
37   // Initialize session string system
38   asciichat_error_t err = acds_string_init();
39   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
40     return 1;
41   }
42 
43   // Generate session strings
44   for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
45     char session_string[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
46     err = acds_string_generate(session_string, sizeof(session_string));
47     if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
48       acds_strings_destroy();
49       return 1;
50     }
51     printf("%s\n", session_string);
52   }
53 
54   acds_strings_destroy();
55   return 0;
56 }




References acds_string_generate(),
    acds_string_init(), and acds_strings_destroy().
